missingEdge: The accepted SOT three-layer contract chain names a post-Kernel Truth Flow layer (TruthReference lifecycle, DistributionPackage, FeedbackProposal). SOT3-T5 built this as a deterministic local package (`DistributionEngine`, `KernelAuthorityBoundary`, `FeedbackEngine`) bound only to the real Kernel's own `referenceState()` resolver; SOT3-T6 proved it executes as a real dependency through delivery, consumption, and terminal acknowledgement inside the three-layer vertical slice.

citations.evidenceRole: reviewer-accepted NEW_OWNER_CANDIDATE disposition (superseded by T5/T6 owner creation)
reviewer acceptance of the post-Kernel Truth Flow package as deterministic runtime owner

citations.lineOrSection: Dependency-Closure Matrix, rows `delivery and consumption` and `terminal lifecycle`
citations.evidenceRole: reviewer acceptance that `DistributionEngine` executes as a real dependency, not a mock, reaching terminal `ACKNOWLEDGED` state inside the accepted vertical slice

impact: Was: blocked any as-built claim that CVF has a post-Kernel Truth Flow lifecycle. Now: the layer has a private-provenance runtime owner; remaining impact is limited to activation, adapter, provider/live, and public-sync claims, none of which this GAP closure asserts.

closeCondition.conditionText: SATISFIED: `docs/reviews/CVF_SOT3_T5_COMPLETION_REVIEW_2026-07-13.md` accepts the post-Kernel Truth Flow package as owner; `docs/reviews/CVF_SOT3_T6_COMPLETION_REVIEW_2026-07-13.md` accepts real-instance execution to terminal lifecycle.

reopenCondition.conditionText: Reopen only if a future review finds the `EXTENSIONS/CVF_TRUTH_FLOW/` owner path removed, superseded, or materially non-functional, or if an operator authorizes package activation/adapter/provider work that changes this GAP's boundary.

actionOwner: SOT3-T7 semantic value audit and closeout
boundaryCaveat: Does not claim package activation, an execution adapter, provider/live proof, public-sync readiness, or production readiness. Private-provenance implementation only.
